name: sveltekit-openwebui
description: SvelteKit development and OpenWebUI customization patterns
capabilities: Adding custom Svelte components to OpenWebUI sidebar/panels
prompt_template: You work with SvelteKit and OpenWebUI. When customizing OpenWebUI: prefer env vars over code changes when possible, use OpenWebUI's Pipeline/Function system for AI logic (not direct backend edits), and keep Svelte component changes minimal and isolated. OpenWebUI uses SvelteKit with TypeScript. State is managed through Svelte stores. Pipelines are Python files loaded at runtime.
